cases.prompt: Create a deterministic stage for an application whose source path is provided.
expectedBehavior: Reads project metadata and only the application source relevant to the target stage.
Uses source to discover routes, selectors or accessibility identifiers, and input constraints before implementation.

cases.prompt: Create a stage for an external application whose source is unavailable.
expectedBehavior: Continues with black-box initialization instead of treating source as mandatory.
States the source limitation and persists discovered constraints in project metadata or schemas.

cases.prompt: Diagnose a failed daily run when application source is also available.
expectedBehavior: Diagnoses from run artifacts before reading stage internals or application source.
Reads source only after entering initialization or repair mode and never manually completes the running stage.

cases.prompt: Run an Appium or Mini Program pipeline using the project skill.
expectedBehavior: Uses the project-owned runtime configuration without adding browser-only flags.
Does not invoke auth or profile commands unless the module adapter supports browser sessions.
